title: The Lost Reservation
content: After arriving at a mountain lodge, Daniel discovered that his reservation could not be located in the booking system. The staff searched carefully but found no record of the reservation. Fortunately, Daniel had saved confirmation emails and payment receipts. Using those documents, they eventually identified a clerical error and corrected the mistake. Although the issue delayed check-in by nearly an hour, the staff remained helpful throughout the process. Once settled into his room, Daniel was able to relax and enjoy the scenery. The experience reinforced the importance of keeping travel records accessible.
